headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 25, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their matchup. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. The Los Angeles Angels placed C Logan O'Hoppe on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture. The Chicago Cubs placed LHP Riley Martin on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 24, 2026, due to left elbow inflammation. The Detroit Tigers placed RHP Connor Seabold on the 15-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation. The Cleveland Guardians placed RHP Shawn Armstrong on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026, due to a right groin strain. The New York Yankees placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026, due to right shoulder discomfort. The Cincinnati Reds placed 3B Eugenio Suárez on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026, due to a mild left oblique strain. The Toronto Blue Jays placed RF Nathan Lukes on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain.

Several teams made notable roster moves. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come from Behind to Defeat Cardinals 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their matchup. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins in 6-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Robbie Ray pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 1 earned run, 4 hits, and 3 walks while striking out 4 batters.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Orioles 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Willson Contreras and Ceddanne Rafaela leading the charge for the winning team.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Phillies 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 6-2 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Ronald Acuña Jr. and Matt Olson leading the charge for the Braves. Kyle Schwarber and Aaron Nola had notable performances for the Phillies.

top_news.title: **Logan O'Hoppe Sidelined with Left Wrist Fracture**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels catcher Logan O'Hoppe has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
